_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: include or exclude all six stars from the randomizer.
if excluded (false), you can't play any 6 stars. in all the runs.
in the template yaml, you can also choose which individual 6 star should be removed.
This is done, becuase there is no way to do ti via the json file (yet).
how the 5 stars will be randomised
'as individual items': all 5 stars are individual items. When you get this, you instantly get access to e2
'progressive items': all 5 stars are progressive items. first item, you unlock all 5 stars. Second progressive item unlocks e2
'exclude': no 5 stars will be included. Alternatively could be used as you can always use 5 stars
how the 4 stars will be randomised
'progressive items': all 4 stars are progressive items. first item, you unlock all 4 stars. Second progressive item unlocks e2
'exclude': no 4 stars will be included. Alternatively could be used as you can always use 4 stars
how the 3 stars will be randomised
'progressive items': all 3 stars are progressive items. first item, you unlock all 3 stars. Second progressive item unlocks e2
'exclude': no 3 stars will be included. Alternatively could be used as you can always use 3 stars
add a item for unlocking random operators.
use websites like https://akgcc.github.io/randomizer/ to choose what operator you can use.
alternatively, use this as 'unlock a character you want' item
include all the sub operations.
these are all the stages with s infront.
include all the challenge operations.
adverse environment are also included as 'challenge operations'.
the new main story has a new difficulty called strategic simulation.
Add these operations in the randomizer. The two floors are separate locations,
and have two different keys to unlock.
